segments.text: Today I want to show you a simple structure for better one on one meetings.
Start with context, then talk through blockers, then leave time for decisions and follow ups.
One quote I come back to is this: clarity reduces anxiety.
If the team leaves with owners and dates, the meeting was useful.

fullText: Today I want to show you a simple structure for better one on one meetings. Start with context, then talk through blockers, then leave time for decisions and follow ups. One quote I come back to is this: clarity reduces anxiety. If the team leaves with owners and dates, the meeting was useful.
